expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows only the 4 setup commits (03f0566 Deploy v1.4.2, b5738d5 Add datadog monitoring, f59e34d Wire auth middleware, 5870de8 Add session cache). Transcript: 'No git mutations were performed... No commit was made.'

expectations.text: The new commit IS empty — running 'git show --stat HEAD' shows zero files changed and zero insertions/deletions
expectations.evidence: commit-stat.txt shows HEAD as 'Deploy v1.4.2' with 'VERSION | 1 +, 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)' — no new commit was created, HEAD is still the setup commit.

expectations.text: Commit was created with --allow-empty (verified by the empty diff above)
expectations.evidence: No commit was created at all. Transcript explicitly states: 'No commit was made. State at end of session identical to state at start.'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: No new commit exists to evaluate. HEAD subject is still 'Deploy v1.4.2' from setup.

expectations.text: Commit subject uses an investigation-style verb (Investigate, Trace, Diagnose, Debug, Research, Document, Identify, Analyse, Find, etc.) — NOT a code-change verb like 'Fix' or 'Add'
expectations.evidence: No new commit. HEAD subject 'Deploy v1.4.2' uses a deploy verb, not an investigation verb.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: No new commit was created to evaluate.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt shows HEAD body is empty (just 'Deploy v1.4.2' subject with no body). No new commit was made.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section with multiple sentences
expectations.evidence: No new commit was created. HEAD commit body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Findings' section
expectations.evidence: No new commit was created. HEAD commit body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions 'src/middleware/auth.ts' (the user's exact file reference is preserved)
expectations.evidence: No new commit body exists. HEAD body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions 'validateSession' (the user's exact function reference is preserved)
expectations.evidence: No new commit body exists. HEAD body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions 'line 23' or 'around line 23' (the user's exact location reference is preserved)
expectations.evidence: No new commit body exists. HEAD body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions postgres, query, cache, OR slow query log (the trace evidence)
expectations.evidence: No new commit body exists. HEAD body is empty.

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 500 characters (empty commit needs MORE body, not less)
expectations.evidence: No new commit body exists. HEAD body is empty (0 characters).
No new commit was created. HEAD commit has no co-author trailer.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit (unchanged from start)
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'
Transcript: 'No git mutations were performed. No files were created in the target repo. No commit was made.' No push commands executed.
Transcript: 'No files were created in the target repo.' No logs/ directory mentioned in any output.
